message:
fix: test act() warnings, date arithmetic DST bugs, CLI output improvements, and multi-model feedback UI

Tests:
- Wrap fireEvent.click() calls in act(async () => { ... }) across
  CodeBlock, referral-card, referral-share-modal, and CommunityPromptCard
  tests to eliminate React state-update-outside-act warnings.

Date arithmetic:
- action-store.ts: Replace setDate(getDate() + days) with explicit
  millisecond arithmetic (Date.getTime() + days * 86400000) to avoid
  incorrect results at DST transitions and month boundaries.
- review-store.ts: Same fix for the "thirty days ago" calculation.

CLI improvements:
- copy.ts: Add writeJson()/writeJsonError() helpers for consistent JSON
  output; remove unreachable return after process.exit(1).
- list.ts: Support comma-separated --tag values (e.g., --tag "coding,ai")
  by splitting on commas and matching any.
- search.ts: Switch to compact JSON output. Rewrite mergeResults() dedup
  to keep the highest-scored entry per ID instead of first-seen.

UI:
- multi-model-feedback.tsx: Replace full-card <motion.a> link with
  <motion.div> and scope the external navigation to only the "View post"
  text, preventing accidental navigations when clicking anywhere on the
  card.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
